Table compliance.export_license {
  export_license_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the export license record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Export licenses are issued to specific customer accounts; required for license management reports and export compliance tracking.']
  authorized_commodities varchar [note: 'List of controlled items or technology categories covered by the license.']
  authorized_countries varchar [note: 'ISO 3-letter country codes where export is permitted.']
  authorized_end_users varchar [note: 'Names of approved end-user organizations or individuals.']
  compliance_agreement varchar [note: 'Reference to the signed compliance agreement document.']
  conditions varchar [note: 'Specific conditions, restrictions, or reporting requirements attached to the license.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date the license becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date the license expires or ends.']
  end_use_certificate_type varchar [note: 'Type of supporting end-use documentation.']
  end_use_description varchar [note: 'Description of the intended end use of the exported technology.']
  end_user_address varchar [note: 'Physical address of the end user.']
  end_user_name varchar [note: 'Name of the end user or recipient of the exported item.']
  export_license_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the license.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date the license was issued.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Government agency that issued the license (e.g., BIS, DDTC).']
  license_number varchar [note: 'Official license or registration number assigned by the issuing authority.']
  license_type varchar [note: 'Category of export authorization.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the license record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the license record.']
  registration_category varchar [note: 'ITAR registration category for the entity.']
  renewal_date date [note: 'Deadline by which renewal must be submitted.']
  renewal_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the license must be renewed before expiry.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system of record where the license data originates (e.g., SAP S/4HANA).']
  usml_category varchar [note: 'United States Munitions List category applicable for ITAR licenses.']
  value_ceiling decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary value allowed under the license.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when verification was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of end-use verification.']

  Note: 'Master record for all export authorizations, registrations, and supporting end-use documentation under EAR (BIS) and ITAR (DDTC) governing semiconductor ICs, SoCs, ASICs, IP cores, and controlled technology. Captures authorization type (individual validated license, distribution license, deemed export license, ITAR registration, license exception, TAA), issuing authority, license/registration number, authorized scope (commodities, destinations, end-users, USML categories), validity period, value ceiling, conditions, and renewal status. For ITAR registrations: registration category (manufacturer, exporter, broker), USML categories covered, empowered official, and compliance agreements. For end-use documentation: certificate type (end-user statement, import certificate, delivery verification certificate), customer/end-user details, authorized/prohibited end-use descriptions, and verification status. SSOT for all export control authorizations, ITAR registrations, and supporting end-use certificates.'
}

Table compliance.export_license_usage {
  export_license_usage_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each export license usage record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party receiving the shipment.']
  eccn_classification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.eccn_classification. Business justification: Export license usage must reference the ECCN classification of the commodity; linking enables lookup of classification details.']
  fabrication_wafer_lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to fabrication.fabrication_wafer_lot. Business justification: Export License Usage reports track which wafer lot consumed the licensed technology, essential for audit of export-controlled semiconductor shipments.']
  line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order_line. Business justification: License consumption is tracked at line-item level for quantity and value accounting against license ceiling. Compliance accounting for multi-line orders.']
  order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order. Business justification: License usage records must reference the order consuming license authority for audit trail and remaining balance calculation. Regulatory requirement for license accounting.']
  primary_export_license_id varchar [note: 'Internal surrogate key referencing the export license that is being drawn down.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.shipment. Business justification: License usage is recorded at shipment execution for actual export date and declared value reporting to licensing authority. Regulatory reporting at goods movement.']
  to_export_license_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.export_license.export_license_id — Every license usage drawdown MUST reference the parent export license being consumed. This is the fundamental header-to-line relationship for license balance tracking. Without this FK, license utiliza']
  audit_trail varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes capturing audit comments, exceptions, or manual adjustments.']
  commodity_usml_category varchar [note: 'United States Munitions List category, if the commodity falls under ITAR.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of compliance verification for this usage.']
  consignee_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the consignee organization or individual.']
  cumulative_license_utilization_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Running percentage of the total licensed quantity that has been used.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the declared value.']
  declared_value decimal(20,2) [note: 'Monetary value declared for customs and licensing purposes.']
  destination_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the shipment destination.']
  end_user_name varchar [note: 'Name of the ultimate end‑user of the exported commodity.']
  export_control_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory regime governing the export (e.g., EAR, ITAR).']
  export_date date [note: 'Date the shipment was exported and the license drawdown occurred.']
  export_license_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the license (e.g., General, Specific, Temporary).']
  export_license_usage_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the usage record.']
  is_sensitive boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the usage record contains information subject to heightened confidentiality.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last updated the usage record.']
  license_balance_remaining decimal(20,2) [note: 'Remaining quantity or value available under the export license after this drawdown.']
  quantity decimal(20,4) [note: 'Numeric amount of the commodity shipped.']
  quantity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the exported quantity.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the usage record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the usage record.']
  to_export_license varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.export_license.export_license_id — Every license usage drawdown MUST reference its parent export license. Without this FK, usage records are orphaned and license balance tracking is impossible. Production-critical for BIS reporting.']
  usage_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the usage event, often used in audit and reporting.']

  Note: 'Transactional record tracking individual shipment drawdowns against an export license. Captures the shipment reference, export license consumed, commodity ECCN/USML category, quantity shipped, declared value, destination country, consignee, end-user, export date, and cumulative license utilization. Enables real-time license balance monitoring and BIS/DDTC reporting compliance.'
}

Table compliance.eccn_classification {
  eccn_classification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key for the ECCN classification master record.']
  primary_eccn_export_license_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.export_license.export_license_id — Export licenses authorize specific ECCN-classified items. The license must reference the ECCN classification to validate commodity scope. Critical for license applicability determination.']
  to_export_license_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.export_license.export_license_id — Export licenses are issued for specific ECCN-classified items. The ECCN classification drives license requirement determination.']
  change_history varchar [note: 'Chronological log of changes made to the ECCN record.']
  classification_rationale varchar [note: 'Narrative explanation of why the specific ECCN was assigned.']
  classification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the ECCN classification was recorded.']
  classification_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the ECCN classification record (e.g., v1.0).']
  classifying_engineer varchar [note: 'Name of the engineer or specialist who performed the ECCN classification.']
  compliance_officer varchar [note: 'Name of the compliance officer responsible for oversight of the ECCN record.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance assessment of the ECCN record.']
  controlling_parameter varchar [note: 'Key parameter that drives the ECCN decision (e.g., process node, performance level).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the ECCN record was first created in the system.']
  deminimis_value_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary threshold below which export licensing may be waived.']
  documentation_url varchar [note: 'Link to supporting documentation or export control analysis.']
  ear_control_codes varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of applicable EAR control codes (e.g., AT, NS, MT, CB, RS, SS, UN, EI). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: AT|NS|MT|CB|RS|SS|UN|EI — promote to reference product]']
  eccn_classification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ECCN record.']
  eccn_code varchar [note: 'Official ECCN code assigned to the product, IP core, technology or software (e.g., 3A001).']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the ECCN classification expires or is superseded (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which the ECCN classification is considered effective.']
  export_license_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an export license is required for the classified item.']
  ip_core_identifier varchar [note: 'Identifier for an IP core or reusable design block that may have a distinct ECCN.']
  is_deemed_export boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the item is subject to deemed export rules.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the ECCN record.']
  license_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the export license associated with the ECCN, if applicable.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next ECCN review.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments related to the classification.']
  performance_metric varchar [note: 'Key performance metric used as a controlling parameter for classification.']
  process_node_nm decimal(5,2) [note: 'Technology node size in nanometers that influences classification.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category of the product to which the ECCN applies.']
  product_identifier varchar [note: 'Unique part number or SKU that identifies the semiconductor product to which the ECCN applies.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory regime governing the classification.']
  restricted_country_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of country codes where export is restricted.']
  review_cycle_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between mandatory ECCN review cycles.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record where the ECCN classification originated.']
  technology_type varchar [note: 'Category of the technology subject to classification.']

  Note: 'Master record for Export Control Classification Number (ECCN) assignments applied to semiconductor products, IP cores, technology, and software. Captures ECCN code (e.g., 3A001, 3E001), classification rationale, controlling parameter (performance level, technology generation, process node), classification date, classifying engineer, review cycle, and applicable EAR controls (AT, NS, MT, CB, RS, SS, UN, EI). SSOT for product-level export control classification.'
}

Table compliance.restricted_party_screening {
  restricted_party_screening_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each restricted party screening record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Customer screening against restricted party lists is performed per account; needed for compliance screening reports and risk assessments.']
  channel_partner_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.channel_partner. Business justification: Screening results are stored per channel partner; the FK ties each screening record to the partner it concerns.']
  export_license_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.export_license. Business justification: Restricted party screening is performed in context of a specific export license; FK provides direct link to license details.']
  analyst_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the compliance analyst who performed the review.']
  analyst_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments entered by the compliance analyst documenting rationale or observations.']
  compliance_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework(s) applicable to the screening (e.g., EAR, ITAR, RoHS, REACH, TSCA, CHIPS, SEMI, JEDEC). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EAR|ITAR|RoHS|REACH|TSCA|CHIPS|SEMI|JEDEC — promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the screening record was first created in the system.']
  disposition varchar [note: 'Final decision taken after the screening: approved, blocked, or escalated for further review.']
  escalation_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the screening outcome requires escalation to senior compliance.']
  escalation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the screening was escalated.']
  is_manual boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the screening was performed manually (True) or automatically (False).']
  match_result varchar [note: 'Outcome of the screening indicating whether the party is clear, a potential match, or a confirmed match.']
  match_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical confidence score (0‑100) representing the likelihood of a match.']
  restricted_party_screening_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the screening process.']
  review_deadline date [note: 'Date by which any required follow‑up review must be completed.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Overall risk classification derived from screening results.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score (0‑100) reflecting the severity of the match.']
  screened_entity_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the party (customer, supplier, distributor, or end‑user) that was screened.']
  screened_entity_reference varchar [note: 'Internal identifier of the screened party in the master party registry.']
  screened_entity_type varchar [note: 'Category of the screened party indicating its business role.']
  screening_date date [note: 'Date on which the screening was performed.']
  screening_lists_checked varchar [note: 'Pipe‑separated list of sanction or restricted‑party lists that were consulted (e.g., SDN|DPL|Entity List).']
  screening_reference_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the screening event for traceability.']
  screening_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp (date and time) when the screening was executed.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that performed or recorded the screening.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the screening record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing the results of restricted party list screening performed against customers, distributors, end-users, and suppliers. Captures screened entity name, screening date, lists checked (SDN, DPL, Entity List, Unverified List, OFAC, EU/UK sanctions), match result (clear, potential match, confirmed match), match score, disposition (approved, blocked, escalated), and analyst review notes. Mandatory pre-shipment and onboarding compliance control.'
}

Table compliance.reach_svhc_declaration {

  substance_inventory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.substance_inventory. Business justification: A REACH/SVHC declaration is made for a specific chemical substance. substance_inventory is the authoritative master record for chemical substances used in semiconductor fabrication. reach_svhc_declara']
  audit_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the declaration record was first created in the system.']
  audit_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent compliance audit.']
  audit_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the declaration record.']
  compliance_officer varchar [note: 'Name of the compliance officer responsible for this declaration.']

  compliance_officer_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the compliance officer.']
  compliance_result varchar [note: 'Overall compliance outcome for the product under this declaration.']

  created_by_user varchar [note: 'System user identifier who created the record.']
  customer_facing_format varchar [note: 'Format used to deliver the declaration to customers.']
  declaration_date date [note: 'Date the declaration was initially created.']
  declaration_type varchar [note: 'Category of compliance declaration (e.g., RoHS, REACH, TSCA, Prop 65, Halogen‑Free, Full Material).']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the stored declaration document (e.g., PDF in the document repository).']
  document_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the declaration document.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the declaration expires or is superseded (nullable).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which the declaration is considered valid.']

  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the declaration is treated as confidential information.']
  is_exempt boolean [note: 'True if the substance is exempt from the applicable regulation.']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the substance is classified as hazardous.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance audit for this declaration.']
  measured_concentration decimal(10,4) [note: 'Actual measured concentration of the substance in the product.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional remarks or comments related to the declaration.']

  product_sku varchar [note: 'Identifier of the semiconductor product to which this declaration applies.']

  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Regulation or standard governing this declaration (e.g., EU RoHS, US RoHS, China RoHS, REACH, TSCA, Prop 65, CHIPS Act, IEC 62474, IPC‑1752A). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EU RoHS|US RoHS|China RoHS|REACH|TSCA|Prop65|CHIPS Act|IEC 62474|IPC-1752A — promote to reference product]']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Sequential revision number for the declaration.']
  signatory_date date [note: 'Date the signatory formally approved the declaration.']
  signatory_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the signatory for audit traceability.']
  signatory_title varchar [note: 'Job title or role of the signatory within the organization.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the declaration data.']
  threshold_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement for regulatory concentration thresholds (e.g., %w/w, ppm).']
  threshold_value decimal(10,4) [note: 'Maximum allowed concentration for the regulated substance.']
  updated_by_user varchar [note: 'System user identifier who last modified the record.']

  Note: 'Master record for all environmental substance compliance declarations covering RoHS restricted substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP), REACH SVHCs (candidate list substances above 0.1% w/w threshold), TSCA reportable chemicals, California Prop 65 listed substances, and halogen-free declarations for semiconductor products and packaging. Captures product SKU, declaration type (RoHS compliance statement, REACH SVHC notification, full material declaration, halogen-free declaration), regulatory framework, substance list with CAS numbers, measured concentrations vs thresholds, exemption codes (RoHS Annex III/IV), declaration date, validity period, signatory authority, and customer-facing declaration format (IPC-1752A, IEC 62474, chemSHERPA). Unified SSOT for all product-level environmental substance declarations required for global market access including EU, US, China RoHS, and customer-specific substance restrictions.'
}

Table compliance.substance_inventory {
  substance_inventory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the substance inventory record.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Surrogate key referencing the supplier master record.']
  annual_usage_volume_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total quantity of the substance used per calendar year, measured in kilograms.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique CAS registry identifier for the substance.']
  chemical_formula varchar [note: 'Molecular formula of the substance (e.g., C2H6O).']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance review for the substance.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status of the substance.']
  controlled_substance_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory category governing the substance.']
  disposal_method varchar [note: 'Approved disposal method for the substance after use.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the substance should not be used.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Regulatory hazard class of the substance.']
  is_controlled_substance boolean [note: 'True if the substance is subject to any export or use control regulations.']
  is_itar_controlled boolean [note: 'True if the substance is subject to ITAR export controls.']
  is_pfas boolean [note: 'True if the substance is a per‑ and poly‑fluoroalkyl substance.']
  is_prohibited_in_eu boolean [note: 'True if the substance is prohibited for use in the European Union.']
  is_prohibited_in_us boolean [note: 'True if the substance is prohibited for use in the United States.']
  is_prop65 boolean [note: 'True if the substance is listed under California Proposition 65.']
  is_reach_svhc boolean [note: 'True if the substance is listed on the REACH SVHC list.']
  is_rohs_restricted boolean [note: 'True if the substance is restricted under the EU RoHS directive.']
  is_tsca_active boolean [note: 'True if the substance appears in the US TSCA Active Inventory.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the inventory record.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the substance record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the substance.']
  physical_state varchar [note: 'Physical state of the substance at standard conditions.']
  purity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Purity of the substance expressed as a percentage.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the inventory record was first created.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite risk score derived from hazard, regulatory, and usage factors.']
  sds_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the Safety Data Sheet document for the substance.']
  storage_location varchar [note: 'Designated storage area or facility for the substance.']
  storage_temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Recommended storage temperature in degrees Celsius.']
  substance_inventory_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the chemical substance.']
  substance_type varchar [note: 'Category of the substance (e.g., precursor, slurry, photoresist, etchant, dopant, carrier gas, solvent, polymer). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: precursor|slurry|photoresist|etchant|dopant|carrier_gas|solvent|polymer — promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Master record for chemical substances and materials used in semiconductor fabrication (CVD/ALD precursors, CMP slurries, photoresists, etchants, dopants, carrier gases, solvents) and packaging materials. Captures substance name, CAS number, chemical formula, SDS reference, regulatory list memberships (REACH SVHC, TSCA Active Inventory, RoHS restricted, Prop 65, ITAR-controlled, PFAS designation), annual usage volume by FAB site, supplier, hazard classification, and disposal classification. Supports TSCA CDR reporting, REACH registration, and PFAS regulatory compliance. Distinct from substance_declaration which tracks product-level declarations to customers.'
}

Table compliance.certification {

  audit_findings_summary varchar [note: 'High-level summary of audit findings and any non-conformities.']
  audit_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required audits.']
  audit_report_url varchar [note: 'Link to the audit report document.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier assigned by the certifying body.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the certification.']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Standard or scheme of the certification (e.g., ISO 9001, IATF 16949, SEMI S2, AEC-Q100). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ISO 9001|IATF 16949|ISO 14001|ISO 45001|ISO 27001|SEMI S2|SEMI S8|AEC-Q100|AEC-Q104|AEC-Q200|IECQ|TL 9000 — promote to reference product]']
  certifying_body varchar [note: 'Organization that issued the certification (e.g., ISO, SEMI, IEC).']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'Broad category of compliance the certification addresses.']
  compliance_risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk rating associated with the certification compliance.']
  compliance_status_effective_date date [note: 'Date when the current compliance status became effective.']

  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the certification expires.']
  external_audit_agency varchar [note: 'Third-party agency that performed the audit, if different from certifying body.']
  internal_audit_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if internal audits are mandated as part of the certification.']
  issue_date date [note: 'Date when the certification was issued.']

  next_audit_due_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next scheduled audit or recertification.']

  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to related regulatory requirement (e.g., ITAR, EAR, RoHS).']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Textual description of the scope (sites, product lines, processes) covered by the certification.']

  surveillance_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent surveillance audit required by the certification.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the certification record.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version or revision of the certification standard (e.g., ISO 9001:2015).']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who created the certification record.']

  Note: 'Master record for industry standard certifications and quality management system certifications held by the organization or specific FAB/OSAT sites. Captures certification type (ISO 9001, IATF 16949, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 27001, SEMI S2, SEMI S8, AEC-Q100, AEC-Q104, AEC-Q200, IECQ, TL 9000), certifying body, scope of certification (site, product line, process), certificate number, issue date, expiry date, surveillance audit schedule, recertification requirements, and current status (active, suspended, withdrawn, expired). SSOT for all third-party certifications demonstrating compliance to customers, regulators, and industry bodies.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_filing {
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory filing record.']
  obligation_register_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation_register. While regulatory_filing alrea']

  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to test.test_program. Business justification: Regulatory filing reports must reference the test program that generated the certification data, enabling traceability for FCC/CE submissions.']
  regulatory_chips_act_obligation_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.chips_act_obligation.chips_act_obligation_id — CHIPS Act compliance reports (a filing type) must reference the specific obligations being reported against. Essential for demonstrating obligation fulfillment through regulatory submissions.']
  acknowledgment_date date [note: 'Date the agency acknowledged receipt of the filing.']

  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the filing record was created in the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the filing becomes effective or applicable.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the filing expires or is no longer applicable (nullable).']
  evidence_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to evidence document proving compliance action.']
  filing_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the filed document submitted to the agency.']
  filing_number varchar [note: 'Official filing number assigned by the regulatory agency.']

  filing_type varchar [note: 'Type of regulatory filing (e.g., mandatory, voluntary).']
  filing_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the filing document.']
  impact_severity varchar [note: 'Severity of the regulatory impact on the business.']
  impacted_product_line varchar [note: 'Product line(s) affected by the filing.']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Indicates if the filing contains confidential information.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or legal jurisdiction of the filing (e.g., United States, EU).']
  regulatory_filing_category varchar [note: 'High-level category of the filing.']
  regulatory_filing_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the filing.']
  required_action varchar [note: 'Action required to comply with the filing (e.g., redesign, labeling).']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the filing was submitted to the agency.']
  submitter_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the submitter.']
  submitter_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the submitter.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the filing record.']

  Note: 'Master record for regulatory filings, submissions, voluntary disclosures, and regulatory change tracking for semiconductor compliance. Covers outbound filings (CHIPS Act reports, BIS self-classification, TSCA CDR, SEC conflict minerals, ITAR registration renewals, voluntary disclosures to BIS/DDTC) and inbound regulatory change monitoring (EAR/ITAR amendments, REACH SVHC candidate list updates, RoHS exemption renewals, AI chip export restrictions, entity list additions). For filings: filing type, jurisdiction, agency, submission date, acknowledgment, status. For regulatory changes: change type (new requirement, amendment, repeal, guidance update), publication/effective dates, impacted product lines, impact severity, required response actions, implementation deadline, and implementation evidence. SSOT for all regulatory interactions, horizon scanning, and compliance change management.'
}

Table compliance.chips_act_obligation {
  chips_act_obligation_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the CHIPS Act obligation record.']
  obligation_register_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.obligation_register.obligation_register_id — CHIPS Act obligations are a specific subset of the compliance obligation register. Linking ensures CHIPS obligations appear in the unified obligation management framework.']
  award_reference varchar [note: 'External award number or code assigned by the funding agency for the CHIPS Act grant.']
  childcare_provision boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the obligation includes provision of childcare services for employees.']
  chips_act_obligation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the obligation.']
  clawback_condition boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a clawback clause is triggered if obligations are not met.']
  compliance_actual decimal(18,2) [note: 'Most recent measured value for the compliance metric.']
  compliance_metric varchar [note: 'Name of the metric used to measure compliance (e.g., production_units, trained_employees).']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current assessment of compliance against the target.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the obligation record was first created in the system.']
  domestic_production_commitment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the obligation includes a commitment to produce a specified volume domestically.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the obligation becomes legally binding.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the obligation expires or is no longer enforceable; null for open‑ended obligations.']
  evidence_document_path varchar [note: 'File system or URL location of supporting documentation proving compliance.']
  funding_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount awarded under the CHIPS Act grant.']
  funding_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code of the funding amount, typically USD.']
  guardrail_restriction boolean [note: 'Flag indicating a restriction on expanding capacity in China as part of the grant terms.']
  last_reported_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent compliance evidence was submitted.']
  measurement_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the compliance metric is measured and reported.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure associated with the target value.']
  next_due_date date [note: 'Upcoming deadline for the next compliance reporting or measurement.']
  obligation_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the specific obligation and its business impact.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Category of the CHIPS Act obligation, such as domestic production commitment or workforce training requirement.']
  reporting_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal or calendar period for which compliance is reported (e.g., FY2023 Q1).']
  target_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Quantitative target that must be achieved for the compliance metric.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the obligation record.']
  workforce_training_requirement boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the obligation requires a certain number of employees to receive training.']

  Note: 'Master record tracking obligations and commitments arising from US CHIPS and Science Act funding awards and incentive programs. Captures award reference, obligation type (domestic production commitment, workforce training requirement, childcare provision, guardrail restriction on China capacity expansion, clawback condition), obligation description, compliance metric, target value, measurement frequency, reporting period, current status, and evidence of compliance. Critical for CHIPS Act grant recipients.'
}

Table compliance.conflict_minerals_declaration {

  obligation_register_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation_register. Business justification: A conflict minerals declaration (covering 3TG: tantalum, tin, tungsten, gold) is produced to satisfy specific regulatory obligations such as Dodd-Frank Section 1502 and EU Conflict Minerals Regulation']
  substance_inventory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.substance_inventory. Business justification: Conflict minerals declaration references specific chemical substances; FK enables detailed substance lookup.']

  audit_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the independent audit.']

  compliance_officer varchar [note: 'Name of the internal officer responsible for the declaration.']
  compliance_risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score derived from audit findings and material sourcing data.']
  conflict_minerals_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the product\'s material weight that is comprised of conflict minerals (3TG).']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Primary country where the conflict minerals were sourced, expressed as a three‑letter ISO country code.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the declaration record was first created in the system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the declaration data (e.g., SAP, Teamcenter).']

  declaration_type varchar [note: 'Frequency or nature of the declaration.']

  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the declaration becomes effective for compliance purposes.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the declaration expires or is superseded, if applicable.']
  external_report_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier assigned by the external filing system (e.g., SEC accession number).']
  independent_audit_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the independent private‑sector audit that validates the declaration.']
  internal_declaration_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the declaration for internal tracking and reference.']
  is_conflict_free boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the product is deemed conflict‑free based on the declaration.']
  last_audit_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year of the most recent audit covering this declaration.']
  last_reviewed_by varchar [note: 'Name of the person who performed the most recent review of the declaration.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent review action.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the declaration.']
  product_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the product family or line to which the declaration applies (e.g., ICs, packaging).']
  rcoi_methodology varchar [note: 'Methodology used to conduct the Reasonable Country of Origin Inquiry.']
  regulatory_reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework under which the declaration is reported.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal year for which the conflict minerals data is reported.']
  sec_filing_date date [note: 'Date on which the declaration was filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.']
  smelter_refiner_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of smelters and refiners (SOR) used in the supply chain for the declared product.']
  source_country_of_material varchar [note: 'Primary country where the raw material containing the conflict minerals was sourced.']
  supplier_certification_status varchar [note: 'Current certification status of the supplier(s) providing the minerals.']
  third_party_verification boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a third‑party verification service was used.']
  total_material_weight_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total weight of the product or component in kilograms used for the percentage calculation.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the declaration record.']
  verification_document_path varchar [note: 'File system or URL path to the uploaded audit or verification documents.']

  Note: 'Master record for conflict minerals (3TG: tantalum, tin, tungsten, gold) compliance declarations required under SEC Rule 13p-1 (Dodd-Frank Section 1502). Captures reporting year, product scope, smelter/refiner list (SOR), country of origin determination, RCOI (Reasonable Country of Origin Inquiry) methodology, CMRT (Conflict Minerals Reporting Template) version, DRC conflict-free status, independent private sector audit reference, and SEC filing date.'
}

Table compliance.trade_compliance_hold {
  trade_compliance_hold_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the trade compliance hold record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Trade holds are placed on shipments to specific customer accounts; essential for hold tracking and export control enforcement.']
  eccn_classification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.eccn_classification. Business justification: A trade compliance hold is frequently triggered by an ECCN classification issue — the commodity\'s ECCN code requires a license that is absent or expired. trade_compliance_hold.commodity_eccn (STRING) ']
  export_license_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.export_license. Business justification: Trade compliance holds are often placed due to export license constraints; FK links hold to the relevant license.']
  fabrication_wafer_lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to fabrication.fabrication_wafer_lot. Business justification: Trade compliance holds are placed on specific wafer lots when export screening flags a violation. The hold record must reference the exact lot to enable lot-level hold management, release authorizatio']
  line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order_line. Business justification: Holds can be placed at line-item level when only specific SKUs or destinations trigger compliance concerns. Granular control for mixed-classification orders.']
  order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order. Business justification: Trade compliance holds block specific orders pending resolution of screening hits, license issues, or end-use concerns. Direct operational link for order release management.']
  restricted_party_screening_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.restricted_party_screening.restricted_party_screening_id — Trade compliance holds triggered by restricted party matches must reference the screening record that generated the match. Essential for audit trail and hold resolution workflow.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.shipment. Business justification: Holds can block shipments at warehouse level when compliance issues are discovered post-order but pre-ship. Operational gate for export control.']
  adjustment_amount_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary adjustments (e.g., duties, fees) applied to the gross amount.']
  commodity_usml_category varchar [note: 'United States Munitions List category for the commodity.']
  compliance_officer varchar [note: 'Name of the compliance officer responsible for reviewing the hold.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'User who initially created the hold record.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.']
  destination_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 code of the final destination country for the shipment.']
  end_user_address varchar [note: 'Physical address of the end user.']
  end_user_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the ultimate end user of the commodity.']
  escalation_history varchar [note: 'Chronological log of any escalations performed on the hold.']
  estimated_value_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated monetary value of the shipment or order in US dollars.']
  export_control_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework governing the hold.']
  gross_amount_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Base monetary amount before any adjustments.']
  hold_notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes entered by compliance staff.']
  hold_placed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the hold was initially placed.']
  hold_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing the specific reason for the hold.']
  hold_reason_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description providing details of why the hold was applied.']
  hold_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the hold for tracking across systems.']
  hold_resolution_action varchar [note: 'Action taken to resolve the hold.']
  hold_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the hold.']
  hold_type varchar [note: 'Category of compliance hold based on export control criteria.']
  is_sensitive boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the hold contains sensitive or restricted information.']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 code of the jurisdiction applying the export control.']
  last_modified_by_user varchar [note: 'User who last modified the hold record.']
  net_amount_usd decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final monetary amount after adjustments.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the hold record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the hold record.']
  triggering_transaction_reference varchar [note: 'System identifier of the transaction that caused the hold.']
  triggering_transaction_type varchar [note: 'Type of transaction that triggered the hold (e.g., order, shipment, account).']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing trade compliance holds placed on shipments, orders, or customer accounts pending export control review. Captures hold reference, hold type (license required determination, restricted party match, end-use concern, country embargo, technology transfer review, deemed export violation), triggering transaction reference, hold placed date, hold placed by, review status, resolution action (release, block, refer to legal, apply license exception), resolution date, resolution rationale, and escalation history. Enables audit trail for export compliance decisions and supports BIS voluntary disclosure documentation.'
}

Table compliance.obligation_register {
  obligation_register_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for obligation_register']
  applicable_product_line varchar [note: 'Product line or family (e.g., ASIC, SoC) that the obligation covers.']
  applicable_site_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the fab or corporate site to which the obligation is scoped.']
  assessment_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the obligation must be assessed for compliance.']
  assessment_method varchar [note: 'Methodology used for the compliance assessment.']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person or entity that performed the assessment.']
  audit_trail varchar [note: 'Chronological log of changes and actions taken on the obligation record.']
  compliance_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category of the obligation.']
  current_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent compliance assessment.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date the obligation becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date the obligation expires or is superseded (null if open‑ended).']
  gap_description varchar [note: 'Narrative of any compliance gaps identified during assessment.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country or region code to which the obligation applies.']
  last_assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent compliance assessment was performed.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the obligation record.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next compliance assessment.']
  obligation_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the regulatory or standards obligation.']
  obligation_description varchar [note: 'Full description of the regulatory, standard, or contractual requirement.']
  obligation_title varchar [note: 'Short human‑readable title summarizing the obligation.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Category indicating the source of the obligation.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the obligation record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the obligation record.']
  regulation_code varchar [note: 'Official code or citation of the regulation (e.g., 15 CFR 734).']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing authority or standards organization that issued the obligation (e.g., EAR, ITAR, RoHS, SEMI).']
  remediation_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions to close the compliance gap.']
  remediation_target_date date [note: 'Target date for completing remediation activities.']
  responsible_function varchar [note: 'Business function accountable for compliance (e.g., Legal, Quality, Compliance).']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating assigned to the identified gap.']
  scope varchar [note: 'Geographic or organizational scope of the obligation.']
  source_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier of the source regulation, standard, or contract document.']

  Note: 'Master record defining individual regulatory and standards compliance obligations applicable to the organization, specific sites, or product lines, including periodic compliance assessment history. Captures obligation source (regulation, standard, customer contract, industry code, CHIPS Act award), obligation description, applicable scope (global, regional, site-specific, product-specific), responsible function, compliance control owner, assessment frequency, current compliance status, next review date. For periodic assessments: assessment date, method (self-assessment, desk review, site inspection), assessor, compliance status (compliant, partially compliant, non-compliant), gap description, risk rating, remediation plan, and target remediation date. Serves as the unified compliance obligation register and assessment tracker underpinning the ISO 37301 compliance management framework.'
}

Table compliance.technology_control_plan {
  technology_control_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the Technology Control Plan.']
  export_license_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.export_license. Business justification: A Technology Control Plan (TCP) governs access to export-controlled semiconductor technology and is directly associated with a specific export license or authorization. technology_control_plan.license']
  primary_technology_eccn_classification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.eccn_classification. Business justification: Technology control plan references an ECCN; FK avoids duplication of ECCN data.']
  process_flow_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to fabrication.fabrication_process_flow. Business justification: Technology control plans govern specific process flows for export-controlled technology, enforcing foreign national exclusions and access restrictions at the flow level. A TCP must reference the exact']
  process_node_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.process_node. Business justification: Technology Control Plans are defined per process node; linking ensures the plan applies to the correct manufacturing node.']
  superseded_technology_control_plan_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on technology_control_plan (superseded_technology_control_plan_id)']
  technology_eccn_classification_id varchar [note: 'FK to compliance.eccn_classification.eccn_classification_id — Technology Control Plans govern access to specific ECCN-classified technology. The TCP must reference the ECCN classification it protects to validate scope and applicability.']
  access_control_measures varchar [note: 'Summary of physical and logical controls required to protect the technology.']
  audit_trail varchar [note: 'JSON or text log of audit events related to the plan.']
  change_history varchar [note: 'Chronological record of major changes to the plan.']
  classification_rationale varchar [note: 'Explanation of why the technology received its export classification.']
  clean_team_protocol_description varchar [note: 'Procedures governing clean‑team members who may access the controlled data.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or remarks about the plan.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance assessment of the plan.']
  controlled_technology_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the technology, process, or data that is controlled.']
  creation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the plan record was first created in the system.']
  data_retention_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the plan record must be retained for compliance.']
  deminimis_value_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary threshold below which export licensing may be waived.']
  design_methodology varchar [note: 'Design flow or methodology (e.g., RTL, gate‑level) covered by the plan.']
  documentation_url varchar [note: 'Link to the detailed plan documentation stored in the document repository.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the Technology Control Plan becomes active.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the Technology Control Plan expires or is superseded.']
  export_license_required boolean [note: 'True if an export license is mandatory for the controlled technology.']
  foreign_national_exclusions varchar [note: 'List of nationalities or countries excluded from access under the plan.']
  ip_block varchar [note: 'Identifier of the IP block or core that is subject to export control under this plan.']
  is_deemed_export boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the plan involves a deemed export under U.S. regulations.']
  it_access_restriction_description varchar [note: 'Details of network, system, and file‑level restrictions applied to the technology.']
  last_reviewed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the plan was last reviewed.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the plan record.']
  mitigation_measures varchar [note: 'Planned actions to mitigate identified compliance risks.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next compliance review of the plan.']
  physical_barrier_description varchar [note: 'Description of any physical segregation (e.g., locked rooms, clean‑team areas).']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the Technology Control Plan used for reference and reporting.']
  plan_scope varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the plan\'s coverage (e.g., specific modules, processes, or IP blocks).']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the plan indicating the kind of controlled technology it governs.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory regime governing the plan.']
  responsible_officer varchar [note: 'Name or employee ID of the officer accountable for the plan.']
  restricted_country_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of countries to which export is prohibited.']
  review_cycle_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between mandatory plan reviews.']
  review_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the most recent plan review.']
  risk_assessment_summary varchar [note: 'High‑level summary of risks identified for the controlled technology.']
  technology_control_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the plan.']
  training_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether personnel must complete export‑control training.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version of the plan for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Master record for Technology Control Plans (TCPs) governing access to export-controlled semiconductor technology, source code, and technical data within facilities employing foreign nationals. Captures TCP scope (process node, IP block, design methodology), controlled technology description, ECCN classification, access control measures (physical barriers, IT access restrictions, clean-team protocols), authorized personnel list, foreign national nationalities excluded, TCP effective date, review cycle, and responsible export control officer. Critical for EAR deemed export compliance in multinational semiconductor R&D and FAB environments.'
}
